g.title: action.usr_circ_history:usr->actor.usr:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (usr) REFERENCES actor.usr(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: action.usr_circ_history:source_circ->action.circulation:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (source_circ) REFERENCES action.circulation(id) ON DELETE SET NULL DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
